xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers package¶

GemNet-OC layer modules: basis functions, interaction blocks, embeddings, and utilities.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.atom_update_block module¶

Atom and output update blocks aggregating edge messages into atom embeddings.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.atom_update_block.AtomUpdateBlock(emb_size_atom, emb_size_edge, emb_size_rbf, nHidden, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Aggregate edge messages into atom embeddings and apply a residual MLP.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_atom (int) – Atom embedding dimension (output).

  • emb_size_edge (int) – Edge embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_rbf (int) – Radial basis function dimension.

  • nHidden (int) – Number of ResidualLayer blocks in the per-atom MLP.

  • activation – Activation function name.

__init__(emb_size_atom, emb_size_edge, emb_size_rbf, nHidden, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize AtomUpdateBlock.

get_mlp(units_in, units, nHidden, activation)[source]¶

Build the per-atom MLP as a ModuleList.

Prepends a projection layer when units_in != units.

Parameters:

  • units_in (int) – Input embedding dimension.

  • units (int) – Output (and hidden) embedding dimension.

  • nHidden (int) – Number of ResidualLayer blocks.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

Return type:

ModuleList

Returns:

A ModuleList of dense and residual layers.

forward(h, m, basis_rad, idx_atom)[source]¶

Update atom embeddings by aggregating scaled edge messages.

Parameters:

  • h (Tensor) – Current atom embeddings, shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

  • m (Tensor) – Edge message embeddings, shape (nEdges, emb_size_edge).

  • basis_rad (Tensor) – Radial basis values for each edge, shape (nEdges, emb_size_rbf).

  • idx_atom (Tensor) – Target atom index for each edge, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Updated atom embeddings of shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.atom_update_block.OutputBlock(emb_size_atom, emb_size_edge, emb_size_rbf, nHidden, nHidden_afteratom, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: AtomUpdateBlock

XANES output block that returns a per-atom embedding (no force branch).

Extends AtomUpdateBlock with an optional second residual MLP fused with the atom skip connection.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_atom (int) – Atom embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_edge (int) – Edge embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_rbf (int) – Radial basis function dimension.

  • nHidden (int) – Number of ResidualLayer blocks in the first MLP.

  • nHidden_afteratom (int) – Number of ResidualLayer blocks in the second MLP (applied after the atom skip connection). Set to 0 to disable.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

__init__(emb_size_atom, emb_size_edge, emb_size_rbf, nHidden, nHidden_afteratom, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize OutputBlock.

forward(h, m, basis_rad, idx_atom)[source]¶

Compute the output atom embedding.

Parameters:

  • h (Tensor) – Current atom embeddings, shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

  • m (Tensor) – Edge message embeddings, shape (nEdges, emb_size_edge).

  • basis_rad (Tensor) – Radial basis values for each edge, shape (nEdges, emb_size_rbf).

  • idx_atom (Tensor) – Target atom index for each edge, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Output atom embeddings of shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.base_layers module¶

Scaled-SiLU, dense, and residual layer building blocks for GemNet-OC.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.base_layers.ScaledSiLU[source]¶

Bases: Module

SiLU activation scaled by 1 / 0.6 to preserve unit variance.

__init__()[source]¶

Initialize ScaledSiLU.

forward(x)[source]¶

Apply scaled SiLU activation.

Parameters:

x (Tensor) – Input tensor, arbitrary shape.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Activated tensor with the same shape as x.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.base_layers.Dense(in_features, out_features, bias=False, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Linear layer with optional activation and He-orthogonal initialization.

Parameters:

  • in_features (int) – Input feature dimension.

  • out_features (int) – Output feature dimension.

  • bias (bool) – Whether to include a bias term.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name. Supported: "silu" / "swish", or None for identity.

__init__(in_features, out_features, bias=False, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize Dense.

reset_parameters(initializer=<function he_orthogonal_init>)[source]¶

Re-initialize weights; zero the bias if present.

Parameters:

initializer – Weight initialization callable. Defaults to he_orthogonal_init().

Return type:

None

forward(x)[source]¶

Apply the linear transform and optional activation.

Parameters:

x (Tensor) – Input tensor, shape (*, in_features).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Output tensor, shape (*, out_features).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.base_layers.ResidualLayer(units, nLayers=2, layer=<class 'xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.base_layers.Dense'>, **layer_kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Stack of dense layers with a skip connection scaled by 1 / sqrt(2).

Parameters:

  • units (int) – Embedding dimension (same for input and output).

  • nLayers (int) – Number of dense layers in the residual block.

  • layer – Layer constructor. Default: Dense.

  • **layer_kwargs – Extra keyword arguments forwarded to layer.

__init__(units, nLayers=2, layer=<class 'xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.base_layers.Dense'>, **layer_kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize ResidualLayer.

forward(x)[source]¶

Apply the residual block.

Parameters:

x (Tensor) – Input tensor, shape (*, units).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Output tensor, shape (*, units).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils module¶

Spherical Bessel and harmonic basis utilities for GemNet-OC.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.Jn(r, n)[source]¶

Numerical spherical Bessel function of order n.

Parameters:

  • r (float) – Evaluation point.

  • n (int) – Order of the spherical Bessel function.

Return type:

floating[Any]

Returns:

Value of the n-th spherical Bessel function at r.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.Jn_zeros(n, k)[source]¶

Compute the first k zeros of the spherical Bessel functions up to order n.

Parameters:

  • n (int) – Compute zeros for orders 0, 1, ..., n - 1.

  • k (int) – Number of zeros per order.

Return type:

ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], dtype[single]]

Returns:

Array of zeros of shape (n, k).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.spherical_bessel_formulas(n)[source]¶

Compute sympy formulas for the spherical Bessel functions up to order n.

Parameters:

n (int) – Compute formulas for orders 0, 1, ..., n - 1.

Return type:

list[Expr]

Returns:

List of n sympy expressions in the variable x.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.bessel_basis(n, k)[source]¶

Compute sympy formulas for the normalized rescaled spherical Bessel basis.

Parameters:

  • n (int) – Maximum order (excluded); produces formulas for orders 0, 1, ..., n - 1.

  • k (int) – Number of frequency components per order.

Return type:

list[list[Expr]]

Returns:

Nested list of shape (n, k) containing sympy expressions that each take a single argument x.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.sph_harm_prefactor(l_degree, m_order)[source]¶

Compute the normalisation pre-factor for a real spherical harmonic.

Computes sqrt((2l+1) / (4 pi) * (l-|m|)! / (l+|m|)!).

Parameters:

  • l_degree (int) – Degree of the spherical harmonic (l >= 0).

  • m_order (int) – Order of the spherical harmonic (-l <= m <= l).

Return type:

float

Returns:

Normalisation pre-factor as a Python float.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.associated_legendre_polynomials(L_maxdegree, zero_m_only=True, pos_m_only=True)[source]¶

Compute sympy formulas for the associated Legendre polynomials.

Parameters:

  • L_maxdegree (int) – Degree upper bound (excluded); compute polynomials for degrees 0, 1, ..., L_maxdegree - 1.

  • zero_m_only (bool) – If True, only compute polynomials for m = 0.

  • pos_m_only (bool) – If True, only compute polynomials for m >= 0. Ignored when zero_m_only is True.

Return type:

list[list[Any]]

Returns:

Nested list of sympy expressions indexed as P[l][m].

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.real_sph_harm(L_maxdegree, use_theta, use_phi=True, zero_m_only=True)[source]¶

Compute sympy formulas for the real spherical harmonics up to degree L.

Variables are spherical coordinates (phi, theta) or Cartesian coordinates (x, y, z) on the unit sphere.

Parameters:

  • L_maxdegree (int) – Degree upper bound (excluded).

  • use_theta (bool) – If True, replace z by cos(theta) in the expressions. If False, use z directly.

  • use_phi (bool) – If True, keep phi in the expressions. If False, replace phi by atan2(y, x). Ignored when zero_m_only=True.

  • zero_m_only (bool) – If True, only compute harmonics for m = 0.

Return type:

list[list[Any]]

Returns:

Nested list of sympy expressions Y[l][m], containing L elements when zero_m_only=True or L**2 elements otherwise.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.basis_utils.get_sph_harm_basis(L_maxdegree, zero_m_only=True)[source]¶

Return a callable that computes the spherical-harmonic basis from z and phi.

Parameters:

  • L_maxdegree (int) – Maximum spherical-harmonic degree (excluded).

  • zero_m_only (bool) – If True, only include m = 0 harmonics.

Returns:

A function basis_fn(*args) -> torch.Tensor where args is either [cos_phi] (when zero_m_only=True) or [cos_phi, theta]. Output shape is (N, num_harmonics).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.efficient module¶

Efficient basis embedding and bilinear interaction layers for GemNet-OC.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.efficient.BasisEmbedding(num_radial, emb_size_interm, num_spherical=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Project a radial and optional spherical basis through a weight matrix.

Supports the efficient reformulation where intermediate triplet/quadruplet bases are zero-padded into dense tensors for batch matrix operations.

Parameters:

  • num_radial (int) – Number of radial basis functions.

  • emb_size_interm (int) – Intermediate embedding dimension.

  • num_spherical (int | None) – Number of circular/spherical basis functions. Required only when a circular or spherical basis is present.

__init__(num_radial, emb_size_interm, num_spherical=None)[source]¶

Initialize BasisEmbedding.

weight: Parameter¶
reset_parameters()[source]¶

Re-initialize weights with He-orthogonal initialization.

Return type:

None

forward(rad_basis, sph_basis=None, idx_rad_outer=None, idx_rad_inner=None, idx_sph_outer=None, idx_sph_inner=None, num_atoms=None)[source]¶

Project the radial and optional spherical basis.

Parameters:

  • rad_basis (Tensor) – Raw radial basis, shape (num_edges, num_radial) or (num_edges, num_orders * num_radial).

  • sph_basis (Tensor | None) – Raw circular or spherical basis, shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets, num_spherical).

  • idx_rad_outer (Tensor | None) – Atom index for each edge, shape (num_edges,). Used for efficient edge aggregation.

  • idx_rad_inner (Tensor | None) – Per-atom edge enumeration, shape (num_edges,). Used for efficient edge aggregation.

  • idx_sph_outer (Tensor | None) – Edge index for each triplet/quadruplet, shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets,).

  • idx_sph_inner (Tensor | None) – Per-edge triplet enumeration, shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets,).

  • num_atoms (int | None) – Total number of atoms; required when idx_rad_inner is provided.

Returns:

rad_W1 of shape (num_edges, emb_size_interm). When only a radial basis is present with dense packing: rad_W1 of shape (num_atoms, emb_size_interm, Kmax). When a spherical basis is present without dense packing: sph_W1 of shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets, emb_size_interm). When dense packing is requested: a tuple (rad_W1, sph2) with shapes (num_edges_or_atoms, emb_size_interm, Kmax2 * num_spherical) and (num_edges, num_spherical, Kmax).

Return type:

Tensor | tuple[Tensor, Tensor]

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.efficient.EfficientInteractionBilinear(emb_size_in, emb_size_interm, emb_size_out)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Efficient bilinear layer that contracts basis tensors against edge embeddings.

Reformulates the standard bilinear contraction into batch matrix multiplications over zero-padded dense tensors for GPU efficiency.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_in (int) – Input triplet/quadruplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_interm (int) – Intermediate (basis) embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_out (int) – Output triplet/quadruplet embedding dimension.

__init__(emb_size_in, emb_size_interm, emb_size_out)[source]¶

Initialize EfficientInteractionBilinear.

forward(basis, m, idx_agg_outer, idx_agg_inner, idx_agg2_outer=None, idx_agg2_inner=None, agg2_out_size=None)[source]¶

Aggregate edge messages via a bilinear basis contraction.

Parameters:

  • basis (tuple[Tensor, Tensor]) – Tuple (rad_W1, sph) where rad_W1 has shape (num_edges, emb_size_interm, num_spherical) for a single aggregation or (num_atoms, emb_size_interm, Kmax2 * num_spherical) for a double aggregation, while sph has shape (num_edges, num_spherical, Kmax).

  • m (Tensor) – Input triplet/quadruplet embeddings, shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets, emb_size_in).

  • idx_agg_outer (Tensor) – Output edge for each triplet/quadruplet, shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets,).

  • idx_agg_inner (Tensor) – Per-output-edge triplet enumeration, shape (num_triplets_or_quadruplets,).

  • idx_agg2_outer (Tensor | None) – Output atom for each edge, shape (num_edges,). Required for double aggregation.

  • idx_agg2_inner (Tensor | None) – Per-atom edge enumeration, shape (num_edges,). Required for double aggregation.

  • agg2_out_size (int | None) – Number of output embeddings when aggregating twice (typically the number of atoms).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Aggregated edge or atom embeddings of shape (num_edges_or_atoms, emb_size_out).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.embedding_block module¶

Atom and edge embedding modules for GemNet-OC.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.embedding_block.AtomEmbedding(emb_size, num_elements=94)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Initial atom embeddings looked up by atomic number.

Parameters:

  • emb_size (int) – Atom embedding dimension.

  • num_elements (int) – Embedding table size. The default of 94 covers atomic numbers 1-94 (Hydrogen to Plutonium). Uses Z - 1 indexing.

__init__(emb_size, num_elements=94)[source]¶

Initialize AtomEmbedding.

forward(Z)[source]¶

Look up atom embeddings by atomic number.

Parameters:

Z (Tensor) – Atomic numbers, shape (nAtoms,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Atom embeddings of shape (nAtoms, emb_size).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.embedding_block.EdgeEmbedding(atom_features, edge_features, out_features, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Edge embeddings from concatenated atom embeddings and edge features.

Parameters:

  • atom_features (int) – Atom embedding dimension.

  • edge_features (int) – Per-edge feature dimension (e.g. number of radial basis functions).

  • out_features (int) – Output edge embedding dimension.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

__init__(atom_features, edge_features, out_features, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize EdgeEmbedding.

forward(h, m, edge_index)[source]¶

Compute edge embeddings from atom and edge features.

Parameters:

  • h (Tensor) – Atom embeddings, shape (nAtoms, atom_features).

  • m (Tensor) – Per-edge features (e.g. RBF), shape (nEdges, edge_features).

  • edge_index (Tensor) – Edge connectivity, shape (2, nEdges), where row 0 is the source atom and row 1 is the target atom.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Edge embeddings of shape (nEdges, out_features).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.interaction_block module¶

Interaction blocks for GemNet-OC (triplet, quadruplet, atom-edge, and pair interactions).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.interaction_block.InteractionBlock(emb_size_atom, emb_size_edge, emb_size_trip_in, emb_size_trip_out, emb_size_quad_in, emb_size_quad_out, emb_size_a2a_in, emb_size_a2a_out, emb_size_rbf, emb_size_cbf, emb_size_sbf, num_before_skip, num_after_skip, num_concat, num_atom, num_atom_emb_layers=0, quad_interaction=False, atom_edge_interaction=False, edge_atom_interaction=False, atom_interaction=False, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Full GemNet-OC interaction block combining triplet, quadruplet, and pair interactions.

Applies edge-to-edge (E2E), atom-to-edge (A2E), edge-to-atom (E2A), and atom-to-atom (A2A) message-passing paths as configured, then updates both the edge embeddings m and atom embeddings h.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_atom (int) – Atom embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_edge (int) – Edge embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_trip_in (int) – Input triplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_trip_out (int) – Output triplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_quad_in (int) – Input quadruplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_quad_out (int) – Output quadruplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_a2a_in (int) – Input atom-pair embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_a2a_out (int) – Output atom-pair embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_rbf (int) – Radial basis function embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_cbf (int) – Circular basis function embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_sbf (int) – Spherical basis function embedding dimension.

  • num_before_skip (int) – Number of residual layers before the skip connection.

  • num_after_skip (int) – Number of residual layers after the skip connection.

  • num_concat (int) – Number of residual layers after the concat layer.

  • num_atom (int) – Number of residual layers in the atom update block.

  • num_atom_emb_layers (int) – Extra atom residual layers before the update.

  • quad_interaction (bool) – Enable quadruplet interactions.

  • atom_edge_interaction (bool) – Enable atom-to-edge interactions.

  • edge_atom_interaction (bool) – Enable edge-to-atom interactions.

  • atom_interaction (bool) – Enable atom-to-atom pair interactions.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

__init__(emb_size_atom, emb_size_edge, emb_size_trip_in, emb_size_trip_out, emb_size_quad_in, emb_size_quad_out, emb_size_a2a_in, emb_size_a2a_out, emb_size_rbf, emb_size_cbf, emb_size_sbf, num_before_skip, num_after_skip, num_concat, num_atom, num_atom_emb_layers=0, quad_interaction=False, atom_edge_interaction=False, edge_atom_interaction=False, atom_interaction=False, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize InteractionBlock.

forward(h, m, bases_qint, bases_e2e, bases_a2e, bases_e2a, basis_a2a_rad, basis_atom_update, edge_index_main, a2ee2a_graph, a2a_graph, id_swap, trip_idx_e2e, trip_idx_a2e, trip_idx_e2a, quad_idx)[source]¶

Run one interaction block over atom and edge embeddings.

Parameters:

  • h (Tensor) – Atom embeddings, shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

  • m (Tensor) – Edge embeddings, shape (nEdges, emb_size_edge).

  • bases_qint (dict[str, Tensor]) – Quadruplet interaction bases.

  • bases_e2e (dict[str, Tensor]) – Edge-to-edge triplet bases.

  • bases_a2e (dict[str, Tensor]) – Atom-to-edge triplet bases.

  • bases_e2a (dict[str, Tensor]) – Edge-to-atom triplet bases.

  • basis_a2a_rad (Tensor | None) – Atom-pair radial basis, or None.

  • basis_atom_update (Tensor) – Radial basis for the atom update block.

  • edge_index_main (Tensor) – Main edge index, shape (2, nEdges).

  • a2ee2a_graph (dict[str, Tensor]) – Atom-to-edge-to-atom graph dictionary.

  • a2a_graph (dict[str, Tensor]) – Atom-to-atom graph dictionary.

  • id_swap (Tensor) – Index mapping each edge to its reverse, shape (nEdges,).

  • trip_idx_e2e (dict[str, Tensor]) – Triplet indices for E2E interactions.

  • trip_idx_a2e (dict[str, Tensor]) – Triplet indices for A2E interactions.

  • trip_idx_e2a (dict[str, Tensor]) – Triplet indices for E2A interactions.

  • quad_idx (dict) – Quadruplet indices (nested dict).

Return type:

tuple[Tensor, Tensor]

Returns:

Updated (h, m) tuple of atom and edge embeddings.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.interaction_block.QuadrupletInteraction(emb_size_edge, emb_size_quad_in, emb_size_quad_out, emb_size_rbf, emb_size_cbf, emb_size_sbf, symmetric_mp=True, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Quadruplet interaction using radial, circular, and spherical bases.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_edge (int) – Edge embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_quad_in (int) – Input quadruplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_quad_out (int) – Output quadruplet embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_rbf (int) – Radial basis embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_cbf (int) – Circular basis embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_sbf (int) – Spherical basis embedding dimension.

  • symmetric_mp (bool) – If True, apply symmetric message passing (ca + ac scaled by 1 / sqrt(2)).

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

__init__(emb_size_edge, emb_size_quad_in, emb_size_quad_out, emb_size_rbf, emb_size_cbf, emb_size_sbf, symmetric_mp=True, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize QuadrupletInteraction.

forward(m, bases, idx, id_swap)[source]¶

Apply quadruplet interaction to edge embeddings.

Parameters:

  • m (Tensor) – Edge embeddings, shape (nEdges, emb_size_edge).

  • bases (dict[str, Tensor]) – Dictionary with keys "rad", "cir", "sph" holding the respective pre-computed bases.

  • idx (dict) – Quadruplet index dictionary.

  • id_swap (Tensor) – Edge-swap index, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Updated edge embeddings of shape (nEdges, emb_size_edge).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.interaction_block.TripletInteraction(emb_size_in, emb_size_out, emb_size_trip_in, emb_size_trip_out, emb_size_rbf, emb_size_cbf, symmetric_mp=True, swap_output=True, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Triplet interaction using radial and circular bases.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_in (int) – Input embedding dimension (atom or edge).

  • emb_size_out (int) – Output embedding dimension (atom or edge).

  • emb_size_trip_in (int) – Intermediate triplet input embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_trip_out (int) – Intermediate triplet output embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_rbf (int) – Radial basis embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_cbf (int) – Circular basis embedding dimension.

  • symmetric_mp (bool) – If True, apply symmetric message passing.

  • swap_output (bool) – If True, apply id_swap when symmetric_mp is False.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

__init__(emb_size_in, emb_size_out, emb_size_trip_in, emb_size_trip_out, emb_size_rbf, emb_size_cbf, symmetric_mp=True, swap_output=True, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize TripletInteraction.

forward(m, bases, idx, id_swap, expand_idx=None, idx_agg2=None, idx_agg2_inner=None, agg2_out_size=None)[source]¶

Apply triplet interaction to edge or atom embeddings.

Parameters:

  • m (Tensor) – Input embeddings (edge or atom), shape (N, emb_size_in).

  • bases (dict[str, Tensor]) – Dictionary with keys "rad" and "cir" holding the pre-computed radial and circular bases.

  • idx (dict[str, Tensor]) – Triplet index dictionary with keys "in" and "out".

  • id_swap (Tensor) – Edge-swap index, shape (nEdges,).

  • expand_idx (Tensor | None) – Optional expansion index for atom-to-edge paths.

  • idx_agg2 (Tensor | None) – Optional second aggregation target index.

  • idx_agg2_inner (Tensor | None) – Optional per-target enumeration for second aggregation.

  • agg2_out_size (int | None) – Output size for the second aggregation.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Updated embeddings of shape (N_out, emb_size_out).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.interaction_block.PairInteraction(emb_size_atom, emb_size_pair_in, emb_size_pair_out, emb_size_rbf, activation=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Atom-pair (A2A) interaction via radial-basis weighted bilinear projection.

Parameters:

  • emb_size_atom (int) – Atom embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_pair_in (int) – Intermediate pair input embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_pair_out (int) – Intermediate pair output embedding dimension.

  • emb_size_rbf (int) – Radial basis embedding dimension.

  • activation (str | None) – Activation function name.

__init__(emb_size_atom, emb_size_pair_in, emb_size_pair_out, emb_size_rbf, activation=None)[source]¶

Initialize PairInteraction.

forward(h, rad_basis, edge_index, target_neighbor_idx)[source]¶

Apply atom-pair interaction to atom embeddings.

Parameters:

  • h (Tensor) – Atom embeddings, shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

  • rad_basis (Tensor) – Atom-pair radial basis packed per destination atom, shape (nAtoms, emb_size_rbf, Kmax) where Kmax is the maximum number of neighbors for any atom in the batch.

  • edge_index (Tensor) – Atom-pair edge index, shape (2, nEdges).

  • target_neighbor_idx (Tensor) – Per-target atom neighbor enumeration, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Updated atom embeddings of shape (nAtoms, emb_size_atom).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis module¶

Radial basis functions and envelope modules for GemNet-OC.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis.PolynomialEnvelope(exponent)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Polynomial envelope that smoothly goes to zero at the cutoff distance.

Parameters:

exponent (int) – Polynomial exponent p > 0.

__init__(exponent)[source]¶

Initialize PolynomialEnvelope.

forward(d_scaled)[source]¶

Apply the polynomial envelope.

Parameters:

d_scaled (Tensor) – Distances scaled to [0, 1] by the cutoff radius.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Envelope values, zero for d_scaled >= 1.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis.ExponentialEnvelope(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Exponential envelope that smoothly goes to zero at the cutoff distance.

forward(d_scaled)[source]¶

Apply the exponential envelope.

Parameters:

d_scaled (Tensor) – Distances scaled to [0, 1] by the cutoff radius.

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Envelope values, zero for d_scaled >= 1.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis.GaussianBasis(start=0.0, stop=5.0, num_gaussians=50, trainable=False)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Radial Gaussian basis functions with evenly spaced centres.

Parameters:

  • start (float) – Start of the centre grid in angstrom. Default 0.0.

  • stop (float) – End of the centre grid in angstrom. Default 5.0.

  • num_gaussians (int) – Number of Gaussian functions.

  • trainable (bool) – Whether the centres are learnable parameters.

__init__(start=0.0, stop=5.0, num_gaussians=50, trainable=False)[source]¶

Initialize GaussianBasis.

forward(dist)[source]¶

Compute Gaussian basis values.

Parameters:

dist (Tensor) – Pairwise distances in angstrom, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Basis values of shape (nEdges, num_gaussians).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis.SphericalBesselBasis(num_radial, cutoff)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Spherical Bessel radial basis functions with trainable frequencies.

Parameters:

  • num_radial (int) – Number of radial basis functions.

  • cutoff (float) – Cutoff radius in angstrom.

__init__(num_radial, cutoff)[source]¶

Initialize SphericalBesselBasis.

forward(d_scaled)[source]¶

Compute spherical Bessel basis values.

Parameters:

d_scaled (Tensor) – Distances scaled by the cutoff radius, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Basis values of shape (nEdges, num_radial).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis.BernsteinBasis(num_radial, pregamma_initial=0.45264)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Bernstein polynomial radial basis functions with trainable decay.

Parameters:

  • num_radial (int) – Number of Bernstein basis polynomials.

  • pregamma_initial (float) – Initial value for the pre-softplus decay parameter.

__init__(num_radial, pregamma_initial=0.45264)[source]¶

Initialize BernsteinBasis.

forward(d_scaled)[source]¶

Compute Bernstein basis values.

Parameters:

d_scaled (Tensor) – Distances scaled by the cutoff radius, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Basis values of shape (nEdges, num_radial).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.radial_basis.RadialBasis(num_radial, cutoff, rbf, envelope, scale_basis=False)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Combined radial basis with envelope, built from config objects.

Parameters:

  • num_radial (int) – Number of radial basis functions.

  • cutoff (float) – Cutoff radius in angstrom.

  • rbf (Config) – Config specifying the radial basis type and its hyperparameters.

  • envelope (Config) – Config specifying the envelope type and its hyperparameters.

  • scale_basis (bool) – If True, apply a learnable ScaleFactor after the envelope multiplication.

__init__(num_radial, cutoff, rbf, envelope, scale_basis=False)[source]¶

Initialize RadialBasis.

forward(d)[source]¶

Compute enveloped radial basis values.

Parameters:

d (Tensor) – Pairwise distances in angstrom, shape (nEdges,).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

Basis values of shape (nEdges, num_radial).

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.scaling module¶

Variance-preserving scale factors and JSON-loading utilities for GemNet-OC calibration.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.scaling.ScaleFactor(name=None)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Scalar variance-preserving scale factor stored as a non-trainable parameter.

The default value is 1.0 (identity, no scaling). Pre-fitted values are produced offline by scripts/gemnet_scale_fitting.py and persisted either via load_scales_json() or as part of the model’s state_dict.

The ref argument is accepted and ignored so call sites match the fairchem-style forward(x, ref=...) signature used by the offline fitter via forward hooks.

Parameters:

name (str | None) – Optional human-readable label (used for logging / JSON keys).

__init__(name=None)[source]¶

Initialize ScaleFactor.

scale_factor: Tensor¶
forward(x, ref=None)[source]¶

Scale the input tensor.

Parameters:

  • x (Tensor) – Input tensor to scale.

  • ref (Tensor | None) – Ignored reference tensor (accepted for API compatibility with the fairchem fitter hooks).

Return type:

Tensor

Returns:

x multiplied by the stored scale factor.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.scaling.collect_scale_factors(model)[source]¶

Return all ScaleFactor submodules keyed by their dotted name.

Parameters:

model (Module) – A torch.nn.Module to inspect.

Return type:

dict[str, ScaleFactor]

Returns:

Dictionary mapping dotted parameter paths to their ScaleFactor instances.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.scaling.load_scales_json(model, path, *, strict=False)[source]¶

Load fitted scale-factor values from a JSON file into model.

The JSON file is produced by scripts/gemnet_scale_fitting.py. Missing keys are tolerated unless strict=True; the corresponding ScaleFactor submodules remain at 1.0 (identity).

Parameters:

  • model (Module) – Model whose ScaleFactor parameters to update.

  • path (str | Path) – Path to the JSON file.

  • strict (bool) – If True, raise ValueError when any ScaleFactor key is absent from the file.

Return type:

int

Returns:

Number of scale factors successfully loaded.

Raises:

  • FileNotFoundError – If path does not exist.

  • ValueError – If the file does not contain a JSON object, or if strict=True and keys are missing.

xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.spherical_basis module¶

Circular and spherical basis layers for GemNet-OC angular embeddings.

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.spherical_basis.CircularBasisLayer(num_spherical, radial_basis, cbf, scale_basis=False)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Circular basis combining a radial basis and an angular (cosine) basis.

Used for triplet interactions that only require the angle between two neighboring edges.

Parameters:

  • num_spherical (int) – Number of angular basis functions.

  • radial_basis (RadialBasis) – Pre-built RadialBasis instance.

  • cbf (Config) – Config specifying the circular basis type ("gaussian" or "spherical_harmonics") and its hyperparameters.

  • scale_basis (bool) – Apply a learnable ScaleFactor to the angular component after evaluation.

__init__(num_spherical, radial_basis, cbf, scale_basis=False)[source]¶

Initialize CircularBasisLayer.

forward(D_ca, cos_phi_cab)[source]¶

Evaluate the radial and circular basis for triplet interactions.

Parameters:

  • D_ca (Tensor) – Edge distances, shape (nEdges,).

  • cos_phi_cab (Tensor) – Cosine of the triplet angle, shape (nTriplets,).

Return type:

tuple[Tensor, Tensor]

Returns:

Tuple of (rad_basis, cir_basis) with shapes (nEdges, num_radial) and (nTriplets, num_spherical).

class xanesnet.models.gemnet_oc.layers.spherical_basis.SphericalBasisLayer(num_spherical, radial_basis, sbf, scale_basis=False)[source]¶

Bases: Module

Spherical basis combining a radial basis and a full angular (spherical harmonic) basis.

Used for quadruplet interactions that require both the planar angle and the dihedral angle.

Parameters:

  • num_spherical (int) – Number of spherical basis functions per angular dimension; output size is num_spherical ** 2 for outer-product variants.

  • radial_basis (RadialBasis) – Pre-built RadialBasis instance.

  • sbf (Config) – Config specifying the spherical basis type ("spherical_harmonics", "legendre_outer", or "gaussian_outer") and its hyperparameters.

  • scale_basis (bool) – Apply a learnable ScaleFactor to the spherical component after evaluation.

__init__(num_spherical, radial_basis, sbf, scale_basis=False)[source]¶

Initialize SphericalBasisLayer.

forward(D_ca, cos_phi_cab, theta_cabd)[source]¶

Evaluate the radial and spherical basis for quadruplet interactions.

Parameters:

  • D_ca (Tensor) – Edge distances, shape (nEdges,).

  • cos_phi_cab (Tensor) – Cosine of the triplet angle, shape (nQuadruplets,).

  • theta_cabd (Tensor) – Dihedral angle in radians, shape (nQuadruplets,).

Return type:

tuple[Tensor, Tensor]

Returns:

Tuple of (rad_basis, sph_basis) with shapes (nEdges, num_radial) and (nQuadruplets, num_spherical**2) (exact second dimension depends on the basis type).
